summary: Created GLSL static analysis utility (shaderIntegrity.ts) with functions to extract declared attributes, uniforms, and varyings from shader source, plus validation functions (validateAttributeBindings, validateUniformBindings, validateShaderIntegrity) that check every GLSL-declared symbol has a matching runtime binding. Integrated validateShaderIntegrity calls into all three geometry systems (pointCloud, particleField, ribbonField) before mesh creation — validation runs before first render and throws on failure. Added 22 tests covering parser unit tests, attribute/uniform binding validation, Three.js built-in exclusion, integration tests against all real shader sources, and the ticket example failure case. Build passes, all 22 new tests pass, no regressions in existing 746 tests.
